title: bupleurum longicaule var. longicaule
intro: Bupleurum longicaule var. longicaule, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a variety of the Bupleurum longicaule plant, which is a perennial herb in the family Apiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. The health benefits of Bupleurum longicaule var. longicaule include its use in traditional Chinese medicine to treat fever, headache, and digestive issues, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In terms of herbal preparations, Bupleurum longicaule var. longicaule is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
